outcome_record.event_name: IPL 2027 Opener — Mumbai Indians vs Chennai Super Kings

prediction.pre_match_note: IPL 2027 Opener. Mumbai (Wankhede Stadium) — evening T20. Dew risk HIGH (March humidity elevated). CSK batting second favoured — dew makes ball slippery, harder to defend. Form: Chennai stronger batting unit for this format.

outcome.final_score: Mumbai 172/6, CSK won with 8 balls remaining
outcome.notes: Dew heavily present in second innings

calibration_flags.notes: Dew factor batting-second model validated in IPL 2027. Dew heavily present. CSK chased comfortably — consistent with all previous dew-active calibration records. dew_factor modifier is one of the library's most consistently validated signals. Third dew-factor validation record.
